TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Trayan, title = Trayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trayan} }

S.FORM: = Trayan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Trayan. 17 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 72 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 30 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 42 hiyi koia. Hangan alang Alang Trayan. Thuyan alang Hangan alang Trayan ni dungus kari Tay- ya do saw bi sluun na kingal kingal qnqahan ka pusu qhuni. Hangan Tlu do thngnan na Tanah Tunux c-min-cen-fu sbiyaw na nniqan sapah keysacu Sun-pn ka hngan na. Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn-u-fng-syang-taw-san cun. klbangan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fng-syang-taw-san-cun nniqan quri 19 ling Sjiqun, seejiq Tay ya o dxgal hini o Tlayan ksun, Gaga mniq hraan hidaw hunac ka Alang cing-cuyn yabi 3500 m hiya. Kndkilan lnglingay Mniq meyn-two-yu-san-siyaw hunac, elug btunux ni Strung elug sung-pn qpahan hiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc teyn-c-snqrayan Tnealang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Srngaw kari Kari Tayal, kari Tlu, kari khilang. Snhiyaan ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pruun gaya Tay-ya-cu ni snslingan patas kaw-sa-cu na bnnatas Prajing mniq may-pa-lay-se sayang na sing-cu-syen-u-fun- cyang-cu ling-cun buku do ida ini tuku ka qnpahang iyux miing bgurah na dxgal thjil mniq dxgal hini kklaan rrigan Pnyahan bnatas Gaya Tay-ya-cu: thjil alang ni skrana. Bnatas Lyaw-sow-cng. Knlngan sing-ung-cwan-ke-sapah paysan Kwang-kwan seyn- tawke. Hngkawas 1984 klabuy 152,319,323 hanhan Yay-wan-ppatas 14: Sing-cu-seyn bnatas Lyow-min- yi dnii. Tay-wan- seng-wun syeyn wey yueyn-hwey hngkawas 2010 klabuy 602. snslingan patas kaw-sa- cu Fan-se-kay-kwan. bnatas Lii- fan-ke- Pusu kmlawa Tay-wan nniqan sapah kesacu, cun-yan-yeyn-cyo-uyen-min-cu-suye sluan bnatas yeyn-cyo-swo, nniqan sjiqun cun-yeyn-yeyn. Hngkawas 2011 klabuy 82-84.
S.PHON: = t…ĺajan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč t…ĺajan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč t…ĺajan. tńßujan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč t…ĺajan ni duŇčus ka…ĺi taj- ja do saw bi sluun na kiŇčal kiŇčal qnqańßan ka pusu qńßuni. ńßaŇčan tlu do tńßŇčnan na tanańß tunux ¶-min- ¶…ôn-*u sbijaw na nniqan sapańß k…ôsa ¶u sun-pn ka ńßŇčan na. nniqan alaŇč siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*Ňč-sjaŇč-taw-san ¶un. klbaŇčan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*Ňč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un nniqan qu…ĺi ** liŇč s…üiqun, s…ô…ô…üiq taj ja o dxgal ńßini o tlajan ksun, gaga mniq ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ ka alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ujn jabi **** m ńßija. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj mniq m…ôn-two-ju-san-sijaw ńßuna ¶, …ôlug btunux ni st…ĺuŇč …ôlug suŇč-pn qpańßan ńßija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶-snq…ĺajan tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. s…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi kńßilaŇč. snńßijaan ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč p…ĺuun gaja taj-ja- ¶u ni snsliŇčan patas kaw-sa- ¶u na bnnatas p…ĺa…üiŇč mniq maj-pa-laj-s…ô sajaŇč na siŇč- ¶u-sj…ôn-u-*un- ¶jaŇč- ¶u liŇč- ¶un buku do ida ini tuku ka qnpańßaŇč ijux miiŇč bgu…ĺańß na dxgal tńß…üil mniq dxgal ńßini kklaan …ĺ…ĺigan pnjańßan bnatas gaja taj-ja- ¶u: tńß…üil alaŇč ni sk…ĺana. bnatas ljaw-sow- ¶Ňč. knlŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô-sapańß pajsan kwaŇč-kwan s…ôn- tawk…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***,***,*** ńßanńßan jaj-wan-ppatas **: siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn bnatas ljow-min- ji dnii. taj-wan- s…ôŇč-wun sj…ôn w…ô ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***. snsliŇčan patas kaw-sa- ¶u *an-s…ô-kaj-kwan. bnatas lii- *an-k…ô- pusu kmlawa taj-wan nniqan sapańß k…ôsa ¶u, ¶un-jan-j…ôn- ¶jo-uj…ôn-min- ¶u-suj…ô sluan bnatas j…ôn- ¶jo-swo, nniqan s…üiqun ¶un-j…ôn-j…ôn. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj **-**.
S.FORM: = Trayan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Trayan. 17 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 72 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 30 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 42 hiyi koia. Hangan alang Alang Trayan. Thuyan alang Hangan alang Trayan ni dungus kari Tay- ya do saw bi sluun na kingal kingal qnqahan ka pusu qhuni. Hangan Tlu do thngnan na Tanah Tunux c-min-cen-fu sbiyaw na nniqan sapah keysacu Sun-pn ka hngan na. Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn-u-fng-syang-taw-san cun. klbangan Sing-cu-seyn-u-fng-syang-taw-san-cun nniqan quri 19 ling Sjiqun, seejiq Tay ya o dxgal hini o Tlayan ksun, Gaga mniq hraan hidaw hunac ka Alang cing-cuyn yabi 3500 m hiya. Kndkilan lnglingay Mniq meyn-two-yu-san-siyaw hunac, elug btunux ni Strung elug sung-pn qpahan hiya. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc teyn-c-snqrayan Tnealang seejiq Tay-ya-cu. Srngaw kari Kari Tayal, kari Tlu, kari khilang. Snhiyaan ci-tu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pruun gaya Tay-ya-cu ni snslingan patas kaw-sa-cu na bnnatas Prajing mniq may-pa-lay-se sayang na sing-cu-syen-u-fun- cyang-cu ling-cun buku do ida ini tuku ka qnpahang iyux miing bgurah na dxgal thjil mniq dxgal hini kklaan rrigan Pnyahan bnatas Gaya Tay-ya-cu: thjil alang ni skrana. Bnatas Lyaw-sow-cng. Knlngan sing-ung-cwan-ke-sapah paysan Kwang-kwan seyn- tawke. Hngkawas 1984 klabuy 152,319,323 hanhan Yay-wan-ppatas 14: Sing-cu-seyn bnatas Lyow-min- yi dnii. Tay-wan- seng-wun syeyn wey yueyn-hwey hngkawas 2010 klabuy 602. snslingan patas kaw-sa- cu Fan-se-kay-kwan. bnatas Lii- fan-ke- Pusu kmlawa Tay-wan nniqan sapah kesacu, cun-yan-yeyn-cyo-uyen-min-cu-suye sluan bnatas yeyn-cyo-swo, nniqan sjiqun cun-yeyn-yeyn. Hngkawas 2011 klabuy 82-84.
S.PHON: = t…ĺajan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn u*uŇčsjaŇč ka alaŇč t…ĺajan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, ** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč t…ĺajan. tńßujan alaŇč ńßaŇčan alaŇč t…ĺajan ni duŇčus ka…ĺi taj- ja do saw bi sluun na kiŇčal kiŇčal qnqańßan ka pusu qńßuni. ńßaŇčan tlu do tńßŇčnan na tanańß tunux ¶-min- ¶…ôn-*u sbijaw na nniqan sapańß k…ôsa ¶u sun-pn ka ńßŇčan na. nniqan alaŇč siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*Ňč-sjaŇč-taw-san ¶un. klbaŇčan siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn-u-*Ňč-sjaŇč-taw-san- ¶un nniqan qu…ĺi ** liŇč s…üiqun, s…ô…ô…üiq taj ja o dxgal ńßini o tlajan ksun, gaga mniq ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ ka alaŇč ¶iŇč- ¶ujn jabi **** m ńßija. kndkilan lŇčliŇčaj mniq m…ôn-two-ju-san-sijaw ńßuna ¶, …ôlug btunux ni st…ĺuŇč …ôlug suŇč-pn qpańßan ńßija. kklaan ppanan mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶-snq…ĺajan tn…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja- ¶u. s…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi tlu, ka…ĺi kńßilaŇč. snńßijaan ¶i-tu- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč p…ĺuun gaja taj-ja- ¶u ni snsliŇčan patas kaw-sa- ¶u na bnnatas p…ĺa…üiŇč mniq maj-pa-laj-s…ô sajaŇč na siŇč- ¶u-sj…ôn-u-*un- ¶jaŇč- ¶u liŇč- ¶un buku do ida ini tuku ka qnpańßaŇč ijux miiŇč bgu…ĺańß na dxgal tńß…üil mniq dxgal ńßini kklaan …ĺ…ĺigan pnjańßan bnatas gaja taj-ja- ¶u: tńß…üil alaŇč ni sk…ĺana. bnatas ljaw-sow- ¶Ňč. knlŇčan siŇč-uŇč- ¶wan-k…ô-sapańß pajsan kwaŇč-kwan s…ôn- tawk…ô. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***,***,*** ńßanńßan jaj-wan-ppatas **: siŇč- ¶u-s…ôn bnatas ljow-min- ji dnii. taj-wan- s…ôŇč-wun sj…ôn w…ô ju…ôn-ńßw…ô ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj ***. snsliŇčan patas kaw-sa- ¶u *an-s…ô-kaj-kwan. bnatas lii- *an-k…ô- pusu kmlawa taj-wan nniqan sapańß k…ôsa ¶u, ¶un-jan-j…ôn- ¶jo-uj…ôn-min- ¶u-suj…ô sluan bnatas j…ôn- ¶jo-swo, nniqan s…üiqun ¶un-j…ôn-j…ôn. ńßŇčkawas **** klabuj **-**.
